title: Rebuild 10 in Tel aviv Israel
wikitext: []: Rebuild 1.0 in Tel aviv, Israel             Quote Post by toe mash » Mon Oct 05, 2009 6:01 pm I doubt there are a few if any other users here that are also from Israel, but in case they are and weren't aware of it, the Icon sci fi convention held between then 4th and 10th of october is showing rebuild 1.0 on 5th and 8th. Japanese dub. Homepage of convention: [url]http://www.icon.org.il/2009/en[/url] The schedule: [url]http://www.icon.org.il/2009/schedule/08_10_2009[/url] (uhh sorry for mentioning this late, I didn't in a million years it would be appearing here) hope this was helpful for someone..
